subtasks.description: Extract company details (name, address, registration number, industry, etc.), primary contact information (name, email, phone, title), and banking details (account holder, bank name, account number, routing number, SWIFT code) from the vendor onboarding form document.

plan.cost_rationale: Single extract task (small tier) because: (1) One document extraction call handles all three field groups (company, contact, banking) in a unified schema; (2) The extraction is straightforward structured field mapping with no inference or cross-document logic required; (3) Small tier (Haiku 4.5) is sufficient for basic field extraction from a single form; (4) No upstream dependencies or multi-source reconciliation needed."
